specs.title: /wines/new renders a form with required fields
Optional fields available via Show optional fields toggle
Wine type dropdown has exactly 8 options
On successful submission, user is redirected to /wines/[id]
Form is usable on 375px viewport with no horizontal scroll
Required fields show inline errors if left empty on submit
Vintage rejects values outside 1900–(current year + 1)
/wines/[id] displays wine fields: name, producer, vintage, wine type, quantity, storage location
Readiness badge is displayed
Quantity increment + and decrement - controls are present
If wine not found, 404 page renders
/wines/[id]/edit renders form pre-populated with current values
On successful save, redirected to /wines/[id]
Delete action accessible from /wines/[id]
Confirmation modal appears before deletion
User redirected to /cellar after deletion
+ button visible on wine detail page
Tapping + increments quantity by 1

suites.title: US-1.2: Log a Bottle Removal Event

specs.title: Tapping - opens Remove a Bottle modal
Modal shows 3 event type buttons: Consumed, Gifted, Opened
On confirmation, quantity decrements by 1
After Consumed/Gifted, prompt appears: Would you like to add a tasting note?
Bottle History section exists on /wines/[id]
Events displayed in reverse-chronological order
When quantity = 0, a Cellar Empty badge is displayed
The - button is disabled when quantity = 0
/locations renders list of locations when locations exist
If no locations exist, empty state message shown
Add Location form present on /locations
New location appears in list after creation
Rename action available on location rows
On successful rename, updated name appears
Delete action shows confirmation modal
Location removed from list after deletion

suites.title: US-3.1: Search the Collection by Text

specs.title: Search bar present on /cellar
Result count label shown below search bar

suites.title: US-3.2: Filter the Collection by Multiple Dimensions

specs.title: Filter panel accessible on /cellar
Active filters appear as dismissible chips
Sort dropdown present on /cellar
/wines/[id]/notes/new renders note form
Required field: tasting date
Rating widget present (5-star or 100-point)

suites.title: US-4.3: View All Tasting Notes for a Wine

specs.title: Tasting Notes section on /wines/[id]
Empty state: No tasting notes yet link shown
Wine form has Drink From and Drink Until year inputs
Live readiness badge preview below the inputs
Wine detail page shows readiness badge
Wine cards on cellar page show readiness badge

suites.title: US-6.1: View Summary Stats at a Glance

specs.title: Dashboard (/) shows 4 stat tiles: Total Bottles, Unique Wines, Drink Now, Approaching Peak
Drink Now tile links to /cellar?readiness=Drink+Now
Dashboard includes Drink Now shelf section

suites.title: US-6.3: See Recently Added, Consumed, and Highest Rated

specs.title: Dashboard shows Recently Added section or its empty state
Dashboard shows Recently Consumed section or its empty state
Dashboard shows Highest Rated section or its empty state
Dashboard shows type breakdown, country/region breakdown, decade breakdown sections or empty state
